create.title: Create New Session
create.description: Search directories or type a new path

create.emptyTypePath: Type a path to start a new session.

tooltip.body: Click to open in new tab

up_to_date_dialog.title: Memory already up to date
up_to_date_dialog.body: Memory is already up to date. Send a new message in this session before re-recording.
